title: DRW MD-DRW-504: Propulsion Installation
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-504 Rev D — Propulsion Installation

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1031, P-1032, P-1039, P-1040, P-1044.
4. Drawn by Marcus Thaine, checked by Tobias Wren, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
